# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Create AWS CloudFormation template for SQS queue and SNS topic setup. Define queue with message retention and visibility timeout. Set up SNS topic for pub/sub messaging. Configure queue policy to allow message operations. This is for our serverless event processing architecture.
# Category: sqs_policy_too_permissive

---
AWSTemplateFormatVersion: '2010-09-09'
Description: AWS CloudFormation template for SQS Queue and SNS Topic setup
Resources: 
  MyQueue: 
    Type: "AWS::SQS::Queue"
    Properties:
      MessageRetentionPeriod: 1200  # in seconds, default is 4 days. Can set to max 14 days (14*24*60) 
      VisibilityTimeout: 30          # in seconds, the duration that received messages are hidden from others receive requests after being retrieved by consumers
      
  MyTopic: 
    Type: "AWS::SNS::Topic"
  
  QueuePolicy: 
    Type: "AWS::SQS::QueuePolicy"
    Properties: 
      Queues: 
        - !Ref MyQueue
      PolicyDocument: 
        Version: '2012-10-17'
        Statement: 
          - Effect: Allow
            Principal: "*"
            Action: 
              - "sqs:SendMessage"
              - "sqs:ReceiveMessage"
              - "sqs:DeleteMessage"
              - "sqs:ChangeMessageVisibility"
            Resource: !GetAtt MyQueue.Arn
